violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service, ice disposed. Beverages prepared with ice were disposed. PIC placed service order during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The door to the outside, located in the basement, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Service was contacted during inspection. Ice was disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
Ice bucket observed stored not stored inverted. Water was observed in the ice bucket, and blender bowl of the Oasis machine. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the Honeydew area. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024

The floors under display shelves in the market area has an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
